description: CompositionBlack pullover made of 100% cotton, has a V-neck, long sleeves, ribbed cuffs and hem, diamond design in red, grey, black and white on the chest, red, grey and black stripes on the cuffs, and embroidered branding on the left sleeveFittingComfortWash careWash below 40 degrees separatelyDo not dry cleanDo not soak, bleach or tumble dryDry in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decoartionsGet rid of those layers of clothes this winter and slip into this comfy pullover from adidas. Crafted from ribbed cotton, it's sure to keep you warm and cosy all day. Layer it over t-shirts and jeans, and pair it with sneakers.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in pulloversHeight: 6'1', Shoulders: 18.5"
